title: portulaca meyeri var. meyeri
intro: Portulaca meyeri var. meyeri, also known as the Yellow Rose, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Portulacaceae family. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, and is believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Portulaca meyeri var. meyeri is often used as a tincture, tea, or dried powder, and is said to promote overall health and well-being.
